response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 16+ years of software engineering experience, some developer-tooling work (CI/CD setup, test frameworks Trial and Fluent-Asserts, MCP code generators), and a clear teaching/community streak (Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course, workshops). However, the resume shows no explicit people-management experience, no stated team-lead headcount, and no organizational-change leadership — all central to a Level II Manager role. Mobile-platform exposure is limited and dated (iOS/Apple TV at WatchUp ~2015-16). Worth a screening call to probe informal leadership and management appetite, but he does not clearly meet the 2-year people-management bar.
strengths: Deep technical breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and backend with 16+ years of hands-on delivery
Demonstrated developer-tooling and testing-infrastructure work (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, MCP generators, CI/CD setup)
Strong teaching, mentoring, and community-building track record (workshops, Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course)
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report experience listed — fails the 2-year minimum
No evidence of roadmap ownership, performance reviews, or leading organizational change
Mobile-platform experience is thin and ~10 years old, weak fit for a mobile-ecosystem productivity team
